meta.title: Proteus · Managed Construction Kit Subscription
meta.description: Grow without drowning in administrative chaos. For German Mittelstand engineering, construction and design firms.

hero.subtitle: For German SMEs in construction, engineering and design. We take over what's slowing you down — so you can do what you actually built the company for.
hero.ctaNote: 15 min · no commitment · in German or English

problem.title: You are the bottleneck of your own company.
problem.p1: You've built a company that's growing. But every invoice, every tender, every employment contract lands on your desk. Admin eats the hours you should spend winning projects, meeting clients, or developing your team.
problem.p2: The problem isn't that there's too much work. The problem is that everything has to go through you — and no one but you sees the full picture.
quotes: I work 60-hour weeks and still feel I'm not really moving anything forward.
When I take two weeks off, half the office grinds to a halt.
Accounting, HR, bids, agencies — I'm the last filter for everything.

solution.title: Managed Construction Kit Subscription.
solution.subtitle: A modular operating system for your company — set up, run and continuously improved by a network of specialised partners. Not a tool you operate yourself, but a team that runs alongside yours.

pillars.title: Co-Produce
pillars.body: We take over ongoing administration: accounting, HR, procurement, bid coordination. Your operational load drops — immediately, not in six months.

pillars.title: Co-Educate
pillars.body: We train your team in the new processes and tools, instead of just outsourcing them. Knowledge stays in-house, no dependency develops.

pillars.title: Co-Innovate
pillars.body: We bring together methods from engineering, construction and software. Every improvement in one member becomes the standard for the entire network.

network.title: Three partners. Three disciplines. One system.
network.subtitle: Proteus is not a single vendor, but a constellation of operational partners with clear roles.

partners.name: Grupo IASA
partners.body: Chilean engineering consultancy with 29 years of experience in mining, water management and port infrastructure. ISO 9001:2015 certified. Brings structured engineering methodology into every mandate.

partners.name: Zebroo
partners.body: Specialists in the operational take-over of administrative functions. Standardise what can be standardised — and identify what should remain your core business.

partners.name: Julasoft
partners.body: Builds and runs the digital layer: tools, dashboards, automations. Whenever software solves the bottleneck, Julasoft steps in.

contact.title: 15 minutes. No sales.
contact.subtitle: We listen, ask the right questions and tell you honestly whether Proteus fits your company. If it doesn't, we say so just as honestly.
contact.name: Name
contact.consent: I consent to processing of my data under the privacy policy.
contact.thanks: Thank you. We'll come back within 24 hours with two time proposals.

cookie.text: We only use technically necessary cookies. No tracking, no marketing.
